languages.text: "Когда-то династия фон Валанциус украла у меня реликвию — Багряную пляску Кхейна. Я счел закономерным ответом изъять у фон Валанциус главу рода — того самого, которого, спустя многие столетия, ты, представитель той же династии, вновь выкрал уже у меня. Способ{mf|ен|на} ли ты оценить изящество временной рекурсии, которая теперь наделяет этот объект особой ценностью?... Вряд ли, но, по крайней мере, я попытался донести до тебя мысль".

"The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."
languages.original_text: "Когда-то династия фон Валанциус украла у меня реликвию — Багряную пляску Кхейна. Я счел закономерным ответом изъять у фон Валанциус главу рода — того самого, которого, спустя многие столетия, ты, представитель той же династии, вновь выкрал уже у меня. Способ{mf|ен|на} ли ты оценить изящество временной рекурсии, которая теперь наделяет этот объект особой ценностью?... Вряд ли, но, по крайней мере, я попытался донести до тебя мысль".

traits.locale_text: "Once, the von Valancius dynasty stole a relic from me. The Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in return. That very same individual whom you, a representative of that same dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with a unique value? I doubt it. But at the very least, I have made the attempt to convey the notion."

Are you capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with a unique value? I doubt it. But at the very least, I have made the attempt to convey the notion."

languages.text: “冯·瓦兰修斯王朝曾从我这里偷走一件圣物——凯恩的猩红之舞。我认为，用冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的首领来交换，再合适不过了。而那人正是你这位王朝代表在数个世纪后从我这里偷回去的那个首领。你真有能力欣赏那时间循环的美妙以及它为这件藏品赋予的独特价值吗？我对此深表怀疑。但至少，我尽力把这概念传达给你了。”
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."

languages.text: «La dinastía von Valancius me robó una reliquia en su día. La Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Me pareció adecuado llevarme al cabeza de la dinastía a cambio. Y es a ese mismo representante de la dinastía a quien tú, siglos después, me has robado. ¿Acaso eres capaz de apreciar la elegancia de la recursión temporal que dota a este objeto de singular valor? Lo dudo, pero por lo menos he intentado enseñarte el concepto».
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."

traits.locale_text: «La dinastía von Valancius me robó una reliquia en su día. La Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Me pareció adecuado llevarme al cabeza de la dinastía a cambio. Y es a ese mismo representante de la dinastía a quien tú, siglos después, me has robado. ¿Acaso eres capaz de apreciar la elegancia de la recursión temporal que dota a este objeto de singular valor? Lo dudo, pero por lo menos he intentado enseñarte el concepto».

languages.text: « Autrefois, la dynastie von Valancius m'a dérobé une relique : la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Il m'a semblé approprié de réclamer la tête de la dynastie von Valancius en échange. Voyez-vous, il s'agit de l'individu que vous, {mf|représentant|représentante} de ladite dynastie, m'avez volé des siècles plus tard. Êtes-vous en mesure d'apprécier l'élégance de la récursion temporelle qui donne à cet objet toute sa valeur ? J'en doute. Au moins, j'aurais tenté d'éclairer votre lanterne. »
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."

traits.locale_text: « Autrefois, la dynastie von Valancius m'a dérobé une relique : la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Il m'a semblé approprié de réclamer la tête de la dynastie von Valancius en échange. Voyez-vous, il s'agit de l'individu que vous, {mf|représentant|représentante} de ladite dynastie, m'avez volé des siècles plus tard. Êtes-vous en mesure d'apprécier l'élégance de la récursion temporelle qui donne à cet objet toute sa valeur ? J'en doute. Au moins, j'aurais tenté d'éclairer votre lanterne. »

languages.text: "Von Valancius hanedanlığı bir zamanlar benden bir yadigâr çaldı: Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı. Buna karşılık von Valancius hanedanlığının başının kellesini almayı uygun görmüştüm. Bahsi geçen hanedanlığın temsilcisi olan senin, yüzyıllar sonra benden geri çaldığın aynı kişinin kellesini. Şu an bu nesneye eşsiz bir değer katan zamansal döngünün zarafetini takdir edebilecek kapasitede misin? Hiç sanmıyorum. Ancak en azından bu düşünceyi iletmeye çalıştım."
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. Are you even capable of appreciating the elegance of the temporal recursion that now endows this object with unique value? I doubt it. But. at the very least, I have attempted to convey the notion."

Bahsi geçen hanedanlığın temsilcisi olan senin, yüzyıllar sonra benden geri çaldığın aynı kişinin kellesini. languages.text: "Die Dynastie derer von Valancius hat mir vor langer Zeit ein Relikt gestohlen ... den Blutroten Tanz von Khaine. Ich hielt es nur für passend, mir im Gegenzug das Oberhaupt der Dynastie zu holen. Dieselbe Person, die du, {mf|ein Vertreter|eine Vertreterin} besagter Dynastie, nun Jahrhunderte später von mir zurückgestohlen hast. Kannst du die temporale Rekursion überhaupt erfassen, die diesem Objekt nun einen einzigartigen Wert verleiht? Wohl kaum. Aber immerhin habe ich versucht, dir den Gedanken zu vermitteln."
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange. That very same individual whom you, a representative of said dynasty, have now, centuries later, stolen back from me. languages.text: 「ヴァランシウス家はかつて、私の所持していた遺物「カイーンの紅舞」を盗んだ。その代償として、ヴァランシウス家の首を取り返した。そして、その首を、今、何世紀も経って、お前がヴァランシウス家の代表として盗み返した。お前は、この時空の再帰によって、この遺物に付与された独特の価値を理解できるのか？理解できないだろう。しかし、少なくとも、私はその概念を伝えることに努めた。」
languages.original_text: "The von Valancius dynasty once stole a relic from me — the Crimson Dance of Khaine. I deemed it only fitting to claim the head of the von Valancius dynasty in exchange.
